outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected in near-term; positive GEX suppresses movement. Potential pinning behavior between 580-591.
outlook.summary: Price oscillates between key support at 580 and resistance at 590/591. Max Pain at 581 acts as downside magnet. Massive OI concentration at 590 across all expiries creates strong resistance near gamma flip. Monthly negative GEX introduces tail risk if support breaks.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Massive OI in all 3 expiries (0DTE: 11K CALL, Weekly: 16K combined, Monthly: 52K combined). Coincides with 0DTE gamma flip proximity. Dealer hedging creates sticky resistance.
0DTE structural pivot where cumulative gamma shifts positive. Break above triggers dealer short-covering cascade. Confluence with 590 resistance amplifies significance.
0DTE Max Pain level - optimal MM profit zone. 1% below spot creates gravitational pull. Flat skew and positive GEX favor pinning behavior toward this level.
RESONANCE: Major PUT OI across all expiries (0DTE: 16K, Weekly: 7K, Monthly: 33K). Dealer delta-hedging provides structural support. High volume confirms active defense.
Significant CALL OI in all expiries. 0DTE shows 5K+ volume spike. Secondary resistance above gamma flip zone.
RESONANCE: Largest PUT concentration across all expiries (0DTE: 17K, Weekly: 9K, Monthly: 40K). Ultimate downside buffer with strong MM hedge support.
Monthly expiration shows massive 38K CALL + 36K PUT OI. Psychological level with dual role. Break above signals regime change.
CONFLUENCE: Highest CALL OI in Weekly (13.5K) with Monthly presence. Upper boundary for weekly price action. Unusual 4K volume on 613 CALL suggests upside speculation.

outlook.summary: Structurally bearish with triple-expiry PUT resonance at 6400-6500. Extreme PCR (3.21 monthly) and smirk skew (1.67) confirm heavy hedging. Spot (6640) trapped between 0DTE and Weekly gamma flips - expect pinning behavior.

levels.motivazione: Triple-expiry PUT WALL convergence: 0DTE (7271 OI), WEEKLY (8546 OI), MONTHLY (24251 OI). Strongest structural support with extreme bearish positioning.
PUT dominance across all expiries. 0DTE shows unusual volume activity (9518 vol vs 5149 OI = 1.85 ratio). Secondary structural support.
0DTE Gamma Flip confluence with Max Pain (6550). Critical pivot where dealer gamma shifts. Magnet effect active within 1.3% of spot.
Weekly gamma equilibrium point. Spot below this level keeps dealers short weekly gamma, amplifying moves toward 6700 resistance.
0DTE CALL WALL with massive 8990 OI. Primary resistance. Proximity to Weekly Gamma Flip (6697) strengthens rejection zone.
Weekly (6318 OI) + Monthly (17713 OI) CALL WALL confluence. Major upside barrier. Monthly Max Pain at 7000 extends target zone.
High OI on both sides (0DTE: 8945 CALL/4997 PUT). Dealer delta hedging creates price friction. Expect choppy price action.
